highlights: Leading development of a bidirectional control channel over SERDES interfaces, integrating next-gen communication protocols.
Designed high-speed SystemVerilog FIFOs with prefetching logic and single-port RAM, improving performance by 50%.
Developed automated lab methodology using Artek Variable ISI, cutting testing time by 60%.
Automated Linux OS deployment over NFS using DHCP and TFTP, cutting deployment time by 50%.
Hardened system kickstarts to comply with DoD STIG requirements.
Engineered an intelligent irrigation system using soil moisture and stem diameter sensors to measure crop health over time dynamically
Calibrated and integrated analog sensors to accurately read environmental variables without succumbing to fast corrosion.
Wrote embedded C++ to process sensor data streams and control water pumps and solenoid valves automatically.
